prompt: Create a vibrant tropical party fashion poster in a dynamic low-angle close-up composition. A young woman stands leaning back in front of a rusty corrugated metal shutter, wearing exactly 3 visible outfit pieces: an open turquoise Hawaiian shirt with large hibiscus flowers and green palm leaves, a white strapless bandeau crop top, and frayed white denim short shorts. Her face is intentionally covered by a plain centered square censor block in warm medium brown, while messy dark hair falls around it. She holds exactly 2 clear plastic cups of golden beer: one oversized cup thrust toward the camera in her left hand, strongly blurred by depth of field and motion, with a foamy white head; one smaller sharp cup in her right hand near her hip, overflowing with thick foam dripping down the side. Show a small belly-button piercing and a delicate necklace. Use dramatic flash photography, glossy skin highlights, strong shadows, shallow depth of field, energetic nightlife mood, and saturated summer colors. Surround the photo with a bold grunge graphic border of paint splatters, torn brush strokes, and diagonal shapes in turquoise, orange, black, yellow, cream, and neon green, framing the subject like a mixed-media collage. Add a small handwritten signature and date in the bottom-right corner reading May 26, 2026 and Oyagi. Overall theme: tropical summer memory. Keep the image vertical, high-resolution, edgy, photorealistic with poster-art overlays, no extra people, no additional cups, no readable brand logos.
